testing_progress.highlight: Glamsterdam devnet-5 running; most Prysm nodes offline, Teku and Reth also down
devnet-6 targeting launch in 1-2 days; requires at least 3 ELs (ethrex confirmed; Nimbus/Lighthouse branches also now available)
glamsterdam-devnet@v6.0.0 EL test release published; another release expected Tuesday with EIP-8037/8038 coverage
EIP-8045 slashing-before-fork testing flagged as needed for devnet-6

epbs_eip7688_devnet7_scope.highlight: EIP-7688 (SSZ stable containers) proposed for devnet-7; Lodestar, Lighthouse, Nimbus ready today; Teku has prototype needing ~2 weeks to update
Arguments for inclusion: ePBS stability broadly achieved; 3 CL clients ready; avoids future awkward workarounds (e.g., attestation count changes)
Prysm builder API testing urged at devnet level before any 'final devnet' designation; Besu echoed need for unhappy-path testing
PTC security concern (voting on non-canonical forks) raised as potential readiness blocker for ePBS; deferred to CL breakout
Barnabas: devnet-7 has a good chance of being the final ePBS devnet

organizational.highlight: ACDC this week at 1400 UTC (original time); last week's earlier slot was a one-off
New REST SSZ Engine API breakout call this Friday at 1300 UTC

action_items.action: Discuss EIP-7688 inclusion in devnet-7 and builder API scope at ACDC Thursday

decisions.decision: No decision yet on EIP-7688 for devnet-7; defer to ACDC after observing devnet-6 stability

targets.target: Glamsterdam devnet-6 launch: within 1-2 days (targeting today if 2+ additional ELs ready)
REST SSZ Engine API breakout call: Friday at 1300 UTC
